newFeatures: New Highest altitude view, with dedicated versions on beings and user profiles
Map, stories, and highest altitude views on user profiles
Swipe between months on the calendar view
Tap entries on calendar and map views to see a quick card preview
Push notifications when your connections share new entries
Daily "On this day" push notifications for anniversaries of your own and shared entries
Global drag-and-drop upload form with media preview before upload
Upload progress visible on entry media, with a lighter progress visual in the PWA
Manage GPX tracks on entries and see total elevation
Loading progress bars for async operations across the app

bugFixes: Timeline no longer jumps back to a previously opened entry
Related stories on Being detail are now shown only once

newFeatures: First few images visible directly in timeline
"On this day" page and banner for memories from previous years
Banner with count of new entries since last visit
Improved Being detail with related stories, map pins, and timeline layout
Map can highlight visited countries
Search in Entry picker
Direct links to Story and Beings from shared entries
Clickable links in markdown text
Image and video glyphs in thumbnails and gallery
Video size warning and better fit for tall media in detail
Restored timeline position when returning from entry detail
Better loading states, faster story lists, and small UI fixes
Consolidated edit menus to a single floating button
Restore map position when returning from entry detail
File upload will continue in background when user leaves entry
More files can be added to queue while uploading
Files can be shared to Recollections from other applications
Preview of all images in Story
Entry and Story maps are fullscreen
UI tweaks, especially on mobile
Filter stories in Story picker
Dark theme for markdown editor
Switch between map types (basic, outdoor, winter)
Year separators in timeline
Faster stories loading
UI redesign
Dark theme
Share all entries that a shared being is included in
Gallery for all images in a story
